Fix: include proposerSignature in governance proposal sync

loadFromDatabase() was saving proposer_signature to SQLite but
not loading it back into the in-memory proposal objects. This caused
governance sync responses to send proposals without signatures,
which EC2 nodes then rejected as "unsigned upgrade proposal".

Root cause of EC2 nodes not auto-upgrading via governance sync.

commit.message:
perf: cache embeddings across semantic_navigate calls

Add embedding_cache (RwLock<HashMap>) to SharedState. semantic_navigate
now checks cache before calling Ollama — warm runs skip embedding
entirely. Cache is invalidated alongside project_cache when files change.

First call: embeds all files via Ollama (same as before)
Second call: 100% cache hit, zero Ollama calls

Also adds 4 tests: all-cached skips Ollama, partial cache embeds only
missing files, stores new vectors, empty files edge case.

security(auth): fix timing attack vulnerability and improve authentication

Fix critical timing attack vulnerability in token validation using
crypto/subtle.ConstantTimeCompare. Enhance overall authentication
security and remove unused REST API code.

## Security Improvements
- Fix timing attack vulnerability in token comparison
- Use crypto/subtle.ConstantTimeCompare for constant-time comparison
- Store validated tokens in context instead of HTTP headers
- Add ASCII character validation (32-126) to prevent injection attacks
- Unify error messages to prevent information leakage
- Remove token exposure in test responses

## Authentication Changes
- Remove Bearer token compatibility, only support X-API-Key header
- Improve token format validation with character set checks
- Add comprehensive security test coverage including timing attack tests

## Code Cleanup
- Remove unused REST API implementation (http_routes.go, examples)
- Remove REST API documentation (HTTP_UNIFIED_ENDPOINTS.md)
- Fix .gitignore to properly exclude binaries but include source code
- Update MCP service scripts and documentation to use X-API-Key

## Testing
- Add 5 new timing attack protection tests
- Update authentication middleware tests (6 test cases)
- Add token format validation tests (6 test cases)
- All 23 security tests passing

enabling seamless image analysis during conversation.

   - Supported formats: png, jpg, jpeg, gif, bmp, webp, tiff

   - Processes detected images with Cross Simulation
   - Converts visual information to Cross 6-axis structure
   - Generates LLM-readable context from images

   - Trigger keywords: auto, yes, allow, 自動, 許可, はい
   - Automatically responds Yes to Claude permission prompts
   - Only activates when user includes trigger words
   - Manual control when no trigger present

- Trigger word detection in send_prompt()

- Directory entry parsing and traversal
- File data reading with fragment table support
- disk_size validation to prevent underflow in read_file_data
- SquashFs<D> FileSystem + SquashFsNode<D> VNode implementations

- 12 tests with programmatic SquashFS image builder
